Introduction

This Security Configuration Assessment Report provides an executive overview of your organization’s Microsoft Exchange Online environment, evaluated against the security baselines defined by the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) through its Secure Cloud Business Applications (SCuBA) project.

The purpose of this report is to assess the current configuration of your tenant against established federal security standards, identifying areas of alignment as well as potential gaps that may introduce risk. These benchmarks represent industry-recognized best practices designed to strengthen cloud security, reduce exposure to common threat vectors, and support a resilient security posture.

The findings presented in this report are intended to give executive and IT leadership clear visibility into the organization’s current security standing, while providing actionable insights to remediate misconfigurations and improve overall compliance.

By aligning your environment with CISA’s recommended baselines, your organization can enhance protection of sensitive data, reduce the likelihood of compromise, and demonstrate adherence to widely accepted security standards.

This report serves as a strategic guide to support ongoing security maturity, risk reduction, and alignment with federal cloud security best practices.
